version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/idempotency) for information on how to use this field.

effective_date.description: The employee's last day of work.

run_termination_payroll.description: If true, the employee should receive their final wages via an off-cycle payroll. If false, they should receive their final wages on their current pay schedule.
